PAWN16.Settings.AutoSeed.Name: Auto-seed Pawn16 board
PAWN16.Settings.AutoSeed.Hint: Create the demo board, seeded piece actors, seeded piece tokens, and helper macros when a GM opens a Pawn16 world.
PAWN16.Settings.WhitePlayerId.Name: White player user ID
PAWN16.Settings.WhitePlayerId.Hint: Foundry user ID of the player who controls the white pieces. Leave blank to assign manually.
PAWN16.Settings.BlackPlayerId.Name: Black player user ID
PAWN16.Settings.BlackPlayerId.Hint: Foundry user ID of the player who controls the black pieces. Leave blank to assign manually.
